title: Unknown Asuka image used in official merchandise
display_title: Unknown Asuka image used in official merchandise
wikitext:
[]: Unknown Asuka image, used in official merchandise             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Feb 20, 2025 6:11 pm This Asuka image has no known artist or source, but was featured in an official calendar sold by Gainax . That's it, that's all the information i have.

[]: Re: Unknown Asuka image, used in official merchandise             Quote Post by DTGee » Fri Feb 21, 2025 5:14 pm It looks like you found the source. It's official art originally made for the 1999 calendar.

[]: Re: Unknown Asuka image, used in official merchandise             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Feb 23, 2025 9:50 am I have known about this illustration for several years, as well as the other illustrations in that calendar that also belong to the same "mysterious artist". I tried at the time to find out who the artist was, but was unsuccessfully. In some places, these images are mistakenly credited to Sadamoto. These illustrations are also not included in any artbook, not even Die Stern , which has all the illustrations from the 1998 calendar. EDIT: this is also a problem with movic (a Japanese anime and related media company): all the Evangelion calendars printed by them do not credit the artists, IIRC.

[]: Re: Unknown Asuka image, used in official merchandise             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Thu Apr 03, 2025 8:03 am Wow! That's neat mate! How many time do you spend searching for these things? Double post; merged -- JoelcrNeto

[]: Re: Unknown Asuka image, used in official merchandise             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Apr 03, 2025 11:30 am I don't recall; I don't think I spent too much time on it.
